compounddef.initializer: template<typename Speed, typename Target> concept MR::UI::detail::ValidDragSpeedForTargetType = std::same_as<Speed, typename VectorTraits<Target>::BaseType> || std::same_as<Speed, float> || std::same_as<Speed, Target> || std::same_as<Speed, typename VectorTraits<Target>::template ChangeBase<float>>

detaileddescription.para: Whether Speed is a valid drag speed type for Target. That is, either a single/vector of float or the same type as target (or its element if it's a vector).
